repair_actions: rewrote model_visible_prompt into six clean sections for every first-episode asset
removed production labels, shot codes, source paths, workflow labels, approval language, and untranslated camera-template residue from visible prompts
added production_metadata.reference_inputs from parent_asset_id and depends_on_assets without copying those ids or paths into model-visible text
added copy_ready.reference_image_instructions and rebuilt all copyable prompt variants from model-visible content
separated reusable asset-card wording from 16:9 video reference-frame wording
added line-control, mask, and post-composite rules for all exact text, symbol, emblem, register, and overlay cases

checks.detail: model_visible_prompt has visible_goal/style_quality/subject_content/composition_motion/visible_continuity/negative_prompt
no prompt ids, episode ids, shot codes, source paths, workflow labels, approval language, or asset paths in model-visible text
no English camera/template residue or malformed punctuation
production_metadata.reference_inputs resolves parent and dependency assets with lock usage
copy_ready contains copyable prompts plus reference image instructions without workflow residue
asset cards remain reusable cards; reference frames remain 16:9 foreground/midground/background video frames
text-like marks, symbols, flags, registers, emblems, and overlays use line control/mask/post-composite rules
subject and hard continuity are explicit enough to preserve story intent and inherited visual locks
